title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Nature Communications Publication Highlighting Pre-Clinical Data for ALLO-329
text: Allogene Announces Nature Communications Publication on ALLO-329. ALLO-329 Overview: Next-generation dual-targeted CD19/CD70 allogeneic CAR T for autoimmune diseases. Off-the-shelf therapy with Dagger technology. RESOLUTION Trial: Phase 1 basket trial evaluates safety/efficacy across lupus, myositis, scleroderma. 3+3 dose escalation. Starting 20M CAR T cells. Two parallel cohorts (low-intensity and no lymphodepletion). FDA Fast Track: Three designations for lupus, myositis, scleroderma. Expected Data: Initial data June 2026. Translational: CAR T expansion, immune reconstitution, biomarkers, early clinical outcomes.
